description: Playbook registry (issue #209): the single source of truth mapping a playbook_id to its release-bundle artifact paths. Every script that resolves a playbook's playbook JSON, anchor-map JSON, section-config data file, or gold-fixtures directory does so through this file (see scripts/playbook_registry.py), keyed on playbook_id, instead of hard-coding a literal path. Adding a new contract type is: author a playbook.json + standard-form + anchor-map + section-config + fixtures dir, then add one entry here -- no code edit.
